holdings.infoBox: IYF is an equity ETF with a total of 147 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 11.53%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 11.43%, Bank of America at 4.68%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 4.21%, and Wells Fargo & Company at 3.97%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Financials ETF (IYF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US financial companies, while utilizing a capping methodology to ensure diversification among its index constituents. IYF was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
